# Casa Punta Caelo

> Oceanfront 3-bedroom vacation rental with maid's quarters in San Carlos, Panama. Sleeps 6 across 3 bedrooms plus a maid's quarters, with 3 pools, direct beach access, and full amenities. About 90 minutes from Panama City. 4.93 stars across 186 reviews on Airbnb.

## About the property

- [Property details](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/property): 3 bedrooms plus a maid's quarters (which contains the 3rd bathroom and in-unit washer/dryer, often used as additional sleeping space); 3 bathrooms total; sleeps 6; approximately 200 m²; oceanfront balcony; pet-friendly
- [Amenities](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/amenities): 3 swimming pools, fully equipped kitchen, high-speed WiFi, air conditioning, washer/dryer, parking, fitness center
- [Gallery](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/gallery): photos of the unit, building, pools, and views
- [Reviews](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/testimonials): 4.93 stars across 186 verified Airbnb guest reviews

## Location and getting there

- Located in San Carlos, Panamá Oeste province, Panama, oceanfront within the Punta Caelo resort. The full street address is shared only with confirmed guests and is not indexed publicly.
- [Transportation](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/transport): roughly 90 minutes by car from Tocumen International Airport (PTY) in Panama City

## Trip planning

- [Things to do](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/things-to-do): beach activities, surfing, nearby day trips
- [Places to eat](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/places-to-eat): nearby restaurants and food recommendations
- [Places to drink](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/places-to-drink): bars and cafés in the area
- [Things to know](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/things-to-know): tips for your stay
- [FAQ](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/faq): common questions about booking and the property
- [Guide](https://casapuntacaelo.com/en/guide): full digital guest guidebook

## Booking

- [Book on Airbnb](https://www.airbnb.com/h/puntacaelopanama): primary booking platform; check-in 3 PM, check-out 11 AM
